category_sources: Official SourceForge code page describes zsh as a customizable command shell for UNIX-like environments.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled ZSH Documentation.
Official source README heading identifies THE Z SHELL (ZSH).
docs_sources: Official Zsh documentation page provides the manual in HTML, PDF, PostScript, DVI, INFO, and TexInfo formats.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge zsh Code page provides the Git source tree and identifies the project as zsh.
The GitHub zsh-users/zsh page states it is only a mirror of git://git.code.sf.net/p/zsh/code, so SourceForge is the official source-control URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge code page describes zsh as a customizable command shell for UNIX-like environments.
source_facts.description identifies a UNIX shell command interpreter.
